hooks.command: jq -e '.stop_hook_active == true' >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0 || echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Before ending this session: if you shipped anything (bug fix OR feature), append an entry to bugs/SHIP-LOG.md using the schema at the top of that file (type, pr, branch, ids, status: pending, tsc). Then state which BUG-IDs or feature scope shipped, with the PR number, so the daily triage can reconcile. If nothing shipped this session, say so explicitly and skip the SHIP-LOG entry."}'
